event_inherited() image_speed=0.33
//Enemy base statistics eName="Magical Bee" eLevel=10 maxLife=280 life=maxLife pointWorth=11 atkPower=4 resType[3]=2 resType[4]=5 resType[5]=5 stunResist=1 baseItemChance=60 baseDropIndex=95 runAcc=1.25
chargeProg=0 chargeTime=65 chargeDelay=100
jeremyText="Basically it's just a really annoying tracking enemy. When you see it stop and aim its stinger at you, it's going to charge toward that point, stinger ready, at high speeds." chaoText="This is from Mickey's Magical Quest. I like all the pretty colors in that game. Sooo colorful!" devText="There are several large maps that circle around Central City that are set up as a huge connecting field that then branch off to their respective areas."
